about.heroSubtitle: Empowering patients through expert orthopedic care in the sanctity of their homes.
about.bio1: Dr. Mansi Vishwakarma is a highly skilled Consultant Physiotherapist with over 7 years of specialized experience in Orthopedic rehabilitation. With a Master's degree in Orthopedic Physiotherapy (MPT Ortho), she has dedicated her career to understanding the intricacies of musculoskeletal disorders and developing innovative treatment protocols that prioritize long-term mobility and pain management.
about.bio2: Having worked as a Center Head at Vertecare-Nx spine center and a Senior Physiotherapist at leading speciality clinics in Mumbai, Dr. Mansi brings extensive expertise in pre and post-operative rehabilitation, spinal and knee decompression, and specialized care for conditions like Arthritis, Ligament injuries, and Ankylosing Spondylitis. Her patient-centric philosophy combines manual therapy, advanced exercise science, and empathetic counseling to achieve optimal recovery outcomes right in the comfort of your home.
about.ctaSubtitle: Book a personalized home consultation with Dr. Mansi today.
